results.evidence: Baseline '## Risks' records data migration, client compatibility, caches/logs/analytics/URLs, and rollback risks.
Baseline scope lists database schema, API payloads, background jobs, webhooks, internal services, and tests/migration tooling.
Baseline includes a '## Acceptance criteria' section.
Baseline includes an '## Approval gate' that says not to implement until plan, compatibility, and rollback are approved.
